summary: Fixed all 4 categories of propositional CI failures: renamed 8 snake_case defs to lowerCamelCase, removed redundant @[simp] from mem_hilbertAxiomTheory, fixed 9 import issues per lake shake, removed unused DecidableEq from FromHilbert.lean. All CI checks pass on both main and pr1/foundations-logic (lake build, lake lint, lake shake, lint-style, checkInitImports, mk_all). 16 files modified across both branches.
